title: ranunculus brevifidus
intro: Ranunculus brevifidus, also known as Short-flowered Buttercup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculus genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Ranunculus brevifidus is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus brevifidus can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or by using it in tincture form.
